title: hydrocotyle dimorphocarpa
intro: Hydrocotyle dimorphocarpa, also known as Indian pennywort or American pennywort, is a perennial aquatic plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic properties. It has been used to treat various health conditions, such as anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, due to its ability to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. Hydrocotyle dimorphocarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
